title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Bolloré Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Bolloré Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!
